heading: Benefits agreement
label: 10167 Benefits agreement
text: Once selection of a site for a monitored retrievable storage facility is made by the Secretary under , the Indian tribe on whose reservation the site is located, or, in the case that the site is not located on a reservation, the State in which the site is located, shall be eligible to enter into a benefits agreement with the Secretary under .section 10165 of this titlesection 10173 of this title
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203
